one_line_ask: Take the approved TitanSeal master logo plus the client's authored InDesign label .indd and Illustrator carton .ai mechanicals, derive the full logo-variant system, data-merge the three SKUs into swappable print-ready label/carton artwork, and output the print PDFs plus a correctly-sized digital-asset pack.
brief:
TitanSeal is a Dubai-based B2B private-label sealants brand launching three SKUs in January 2027. The master logo is approved and supplied as a high-res transparent PNG; the client also supplies two desktop-authored print mechanicals carrying real merge fields/variables (an InDesign wrap label .indd and an Illustrator carton .ai) and a sku_variants.csv with the three SKUs (600ml MS Polymer grey, 600ml PU Construction grey, 300ml Neutral Silicone white). 

Using ONLY the Adobe connector, the freelancer must: (1) upload the supplied logo and mechanicals into a project workspace; (2) build the LOGO-VARIANT SYSTEM from the one master logo — a clean vector SVG (for scalable lockups), a single-color BLACK mono version and a single-color WHITE reversed/knockout version (for the black-on-cardboard carton and dark backgrounds), and a brand-blue color-overlay version — without redrawing the mark; (3) build the wide HORIZONTAL LOCKUP working canvas by outpainting the square logo composition to a 3:1 banner area; (4) run the swappable-SKU LABEL data-merge: the authored .indd + sku_variants.csv produce one print-ready label mechanical per SKU so SKU codes/volumes swap by editing the CSV, then e
